CurrentIssues.ID: FunctionNaming:DiagnosticsScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class, ExperimentalMaterial3ExpressiveApi::class) @Composable fun DiagnosticsScreen( onBack: () -> Unit, onOpenSettings: () -> Unit = {}, onOpenSession: (String) -> Unit = {}, )
